title: Fix Python Jinja autoescape alerts #20 and #21
description: Use safer Jinja autoescape configuration for non-HTML templates while preserving intended output semantics.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started. Migrating Jinja environment setup to select_autoescape with file-based template loading to remove autoescape=False usage.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Completed. Replaced Jinja autoescape=False configuration with select_autoescape + loader-based template rendering in agents management and wiki rendering.
